title: -Contract No. 32500142 Amendment: Azul Works, Inc. for the Ohlone Park Restroom and Lighting Project

sections.recommendation:
Ratify the action taken by the City Manager during the City Council recess to execute an
amendment to Contract No. 32500142 with Azul Works Inc. for the Ohlone Park
Restroom and Lighting Project, increasing the contract amount by $39,000, for a total
amended amount not to exceed $921,278.
NEGATIVE EFFECT IF ACTION DELAYED UNTIL AFTER COUNCIL RECESS
A delay in action until after council recess would delay the completion of the Ohlone
Park Restroom and Lighting project.
sections.fiscal_impacts:
Funding for this contract amendment is available in the FY 2026 budget in the Measure
T1 Fund (511). No other funding is required, and no other projects will be delayed due
to this expenditure.
sections.current_situation:
The contract with Azul Works, Inc. for the Ohlone Park Restroom and Lighting Project
was approved on December 3, 2024 for a total amount not to exceed $882,278.
In June 2024, staff submitted the project plans to PG&E for a change to electrical
services. PG&E determined no change was needed and closed the application. In
August 2025, PG&E identified an error in its prior determination and required the project
to resubmit the lighting plans and reinitiate PG&E review. PG&E provided additional
project requirements in November 2025 which required additional trenching and related
site work at a cost of $39,000 for which a contract amendment is needed.
sections.background:
This project includes a new pre-fabricated, two-stall restroom at Ohlone Park located on
the block between California Street and McGee Avenue, between the Ohlone Park
2180 Milvia Street, Berkeley, CA 94704 ● Tel: (510) 981-7000 ● TDD: (510) 981-6903 ● Fax: (510) 981-7099
E-Mail: manager@berkeleyca.gov Website: https://berkeleyca.gov/your-government/about-us/departments/city-
managers-office
Page 2 of 3
RECESS ITEM
Amending Contract 32500142: Azul Works, Inc. for the CONSENT CALENDAR
Ohlone Park Restroom and Lighting Project January 20, 2026
soccer field and volleyball court. This project also includes the addition of dark sky-
compliant light fixtures in existing dark spots along the Ohlone Park pathway.
The Ohlone Park Restroom and Lighting Project is funded by Measure T1, the 2016
Berkeley voter-approved bond to pay for improvements to City infrastructure and
facilities.
The project was advertised for bids on Friday, September 6, 2024, and bids were
opened on Tuesday, October 17, 2024. The City received 5 bids, from a low base bid of
$698,000 to a high base bid of $1,012,133. The City determined that Azul Works, Inc.
was the lowest responsive and responsible bidder and awarded a construction contract
for the work with Resolution No. 71,589.
ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY AND CLIMATE IMPACTS
The construction contract includes requirements to comply with the City’s
Environmentally Preferable Purchasing Policy and Construction and Demolition Waste
program of at least 50%.
sections.rationale:
The City and Azul Works, Inc. have negotiated a price within the City’s budget to
complete the installation of the basketball court lights and work related to changes to
the site’s PG&E service. This increase to the contract is necessary to complete the
project. The City does not have in-house labor or equipment resources to complete this
renovation project.
sections.alternatives:
None
CONTACT PERSON
Scott Ferris, Director, Parks Recreation & Waterfront,510-981-6700
Evelyn Chan, Supervising Civil Engineer, Parks Recreation & Waterfront, 510-981-6430
sections.attachments:
1: Resolution
Page 2
Page 3 of 3
RESOLUTION NO. ##,###-N.S.
AMENDING CONTRACT NO. 32500142: AZUL WORKS, INC. FOR THE OHLONE
PARK RESTROOM AND LIGHTING PROJECT
WHEREAS, the Ohlone Park Restroom and Lighting Project is a Measure T1- funded
project; and
WHEREAS, the City has neither the in-house labor nor the equipment necessary to
undertake this project; and
WHEREAS, invitation for bids was duly advertised on September 6, 2024, bids were
opened on October 17, 2024, and the City received 5 bids; and
WHEREAS, Azul Works Inc. was determined to be the lowest responsive and
responsible bidder, and references for Azul works Inc. were provided and were
satisfactory; and
WHEREAS, on December 3, 2024, by Resolution No. 71,589-N.S. the City Council
authorized Contract No. 32500142 with Azul Works Inc. in an amount not to exceed
$882,278 for the Ohlone Park Restroom and Lighting Project; and
WHEREAS, a contract amendment to increase the total contract amount by $39,000 for
a total amended amount not to exceed $921,278 is necessary to complete the project;
and
WHEREAS, funds are available in the FY 2026 budget in the Measure T1 Fund (511).
NOW THEREFORE, BE IT RESOLVED by the Council of the City of Berkeley that the
Council ratifies the action taken by the City Manager during the City Council recess to
execute an amendment to Contract No. 32500142 with Azul Works Inc. for the Ohlone
Park Restroom and Lighting Project, increasing the contract amount by $39,000, for a
total amended amount not to exceed $921,278. A record signature copy of any
amendments to be on file in the Office of the City Clerk.
